Label.Text: You save XDB (Y%) for being a member.

Button.TooltipReference: Shift Left. (Or use Right Mouse Button)
Shift Right. (Or use Right Mouse Button)
Shift Up. (Or use Right Mouse Button)
Shift Down. (Or use Right Mouse Button)
Rotate Left. (Or use Left Mouse Button)
Rotate Right. (Or use Left Mouse Button)
Rotate Up. (Or use Left Mouse Button)
Rotate Down. (Or use Left Mouse Button)
